info.title: RevealUI API
info.description: REST API for RevealUI application with OpenAPI 3.0 specification

403.description: AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license
AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license

get.summary: List all registered agents as A2A agent cards

403.description: AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license

post.summary: Register a new agent from an AgentDefinition

403.description: AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license

get.summary: Get a single agent card by ID

403.description: AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license
AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license
Built-in agents cannot be retired or AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license
AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license

get.summary: Get task history for an agent
SSE stream for a running task

403.description: AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license
AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license

get.description: Instant response with no dependencies. Kubernetes/load balancers use this to decide whether to restart the pod.
Alias for the root liveness probe — used by Playwright smoke tests and some load balancer conventions.
Runs all registered health checks. Returns 200 when ready to serve traffic, 503 when a critical check fails.
Exposes all application metrics collected by the core MetricsCollector in Prometheus text format. Requires METRICS_SECRET or CRON_SECRET authentication.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid metrics secret

get.description: Metrics in JSON format — useful for internal dashboards and debugging. Requires METRICS_SECRET or CRON_SECRET authentication.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid metrics secret

post.description: Accepts structured error payloads from CMS client-side and any other app that cannot write to the DB directly. Requires X-Internal-Token header.

403.description: Forbidden — invalid or missing internal token

get.summary: List all consents for the authenticated user

post.summary: Grant consent for a specific type
Revoke consent for a specific type

400.description: Invalid request or cannot revoke necessary consent

get.summary: Check if a specific consent type is active

post.summary: Request data deletion (right to be forgotten)

get.summary: List the authenticated user's deletion requests
Get a specific deletion request by ID

403.description: Admin access required

post.description: Accepts warn/error/fatal log entries from apps that cannot write to the DB directly. Rate-limited.

403.description: Forbidden — missing or invalid X-Internal-Token

post.description: Validates a JWT license key and returns the tier, features, and limits.

reason.description: Why the license is invalid. Present when valid=false. "expired": JWT past expiry or DB status expired. "revoked": explicitly revoked in the DB (chargeback, refund, cancellation). "invalid": bad signature or malformed JWT. "misconfigured": server public key not configured.

features.description: Feature flags enabled by this license

post.description: Creates a signed JWT license key for a customer. Requires REVEALUI_LICENSE_PRIVATE_KEY and admin API key.

customerId.description: Stripe customer ID or internal customer identifier

expiresInDays.description: License duration in days (default: 365, max: 10 years)

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid admin API key

500.description: Server error — missing private key configuration

get.description: Returns which features are available at each license tier.

post.description: Creates a Stripe checkout session for subscription purchase. Requires authentication.

priceId.description: Stripe price ID for the subscription

url.description: Stripe checkout URL to redirect to

post.description: Creates a Stripe billing portal session for subscription management.

get.description: Returns the current user's license tier, status, and expiration.

graceUntil.description: Grace period end date (ISO 8601), present during past_due

post.description: Upgrades an active subscription to a new price/tier mid-cycle. Prorations are created automatically. Requires an existing active subscription.

priceId.description: Stripe price ID for the target tier

200.description: Subscription upgraded — Stripe will fire customer.subscription.updated

subscriptionId.description: Stripe subscription ID that was updated

400.description: No active subscription or no billing account

post.description: Cancels the active subscription at the end of the current billing period. The user retains Pro/Enterprise access until then.

200.description: Subscription scheduled for cancellation at end of billing period

post.summary: Create a perpetual license checkout session
post.description: Creates a one-time Stripe payment session for a perpetual license. Includes 1 year of support. Requires authentication.

priceId.description: Stripe price ID for the perpetual license product

githubUsername.description: GitHub username for revealui-pro team access provisioning

url.description: Stripe checkout URL to redirect to

get.description: Returns agent task usage for the current billing cycle.

quota.description: Maximum tasks for this tier (-1 = unlimited)

resetAt.description: When the cycle resets (start of next month, ISO 8601)

post.description: Finds perpetual licenses whose support contract expires within 30 days and sends reminder emails. Protected by X-Cron-Secret.

403.description: Invalid cron secret

post.summary: Report agent task overage to Stripe (internal cron)
post.description: Reads overage from the previous billing cycle and emits Stripe Billing Meter events. Protected by X-Cron-Secret.
Marks non-perpetual licenses whose expiresAt is in the past as expired, then clears the DB status cache. Protected by X-Cron-Secret.

expired.description: Number of licenses transitioned to expired

403.description: Invalid cron secret

post.description: Creates a Stripe refund for a payment intent or charge. Admin-only. Full or partial refunds supported. License revocation is handled automatically by the charge.refunded webhook.

paymentIntentId.description: Stripe PaymentIntent ID to refund. Provide either this or chargeId.

chargeId.description: Stripe Charge ID to refund. Provide either this or paymentIntentId.

amount.description: Amount to refund in cents. Omit for full refund.

403.description: Admin access required

post.description: Verifies an on-chain RVUI payment transaction and activates the subscription tier. Applies the 15% RVUI discount. Requires wallet address and transaction signature.

403.description: Payment rejected by safeguards

get.description: Returns aggregate revenue metrics for the admin dashboard. Requires admin or owner role.

schema.description: Start of date range for recent events (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago.

parameters.description: Start of date range for recent events (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago.
parameters.name: from

schema.description: End of date range for recent events (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

parameters.description: End of date range for recent events (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.
parameters.name: to

mrr.description: Estimated monthly recurring revenue in cents

403.description: Admin access required

post.description: Receives Stripe webhook events for subscription lifecycle, license management, disputes, and refunds. Requires raw body access for signature verification.

503.description: Webhook service unavailable (Stripe env vars misconfigured)

get.summary: Get provenance for a specific file
Get a provenance entry by ID

post.summary: Add a review to a provenance entry

get.summary: List reviews for a provenance entry

post.summary: Move a ticket to a different column
Add a comment to a ticket
Assign a label to a ticket

delete.summary: Remove a label from a ticket

post.summary: Submit a natural language task for an agent to execute
post.description: Creates a ticket from the instruction, dispatches an AI agent with CMS tools to resolve it, and returns the result.

instruction.example: Publish the Q3 product launch blog post and update the homepage hero

boardId.description: Board to create the ticket on

403.description: AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license

post.summary: Dispatch an agent for an existing ticket

403.description: AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license

post.description: Streams agent execution events in real-time using Server-Sent Events. Client-side: use fetch + ReadableStream (not EventSource — it does not support POST).

200.description: SSE stream of agent execution events (text/event-stream)

403.description: AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license

get.summary: Get a media item by ID

get.description: Uses PostgreSQL full-text search with plainto_tsquery. Searches published posts and/or pages.

post.summary: Batch create items in a collection
Batch update items in a collection
Batch delete items in a collection

get.summary: Export collection data as JSON or CSV
get.description: Admin-only bulk export endpoint. Supported collections: posts, pages, users, sites, media. Limited to 10,000 rows per request.

403.description: Admin access required

post.summary: Trigger RAG indexing for a CMS collection

403.description: AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license
AI feature requires Pro or Enterprise license

apiKey.description: The plaintext API key (never stored; encrypted before persisting)

label.description: Optional user-visible label for this key

setAsDefault.description: Set this provider as the default for the user's agents

model.description: Preferred model for the default provider config

get.summary: List stored API keys (hints only, never plaintext)

post.summary: Replace the plaintext for an existing API key slot
Clean up orphaned vector data (internal cron)
post.description: Removes orphaned Supabase vector data (agent memories, RAG documents, RAG chunks) for sites that have been soft-deleted in NeonDB. Protected by X-Cron-Secret.

agentMemoriesDeleted.description: Number of orphaned agent memories deleted

ragDocumentsDeleted.description: Number of orphaned RAG documents deleted

ragChunksDeleted.description: Number of orphaned RAG chunks deleted

deletedSiteIds.description: Site IDs whose orphaned data was cleaned up

dryRun.description: Whether this was a dry-run (no actual deletions)

403.description: Invalid cron secret
Forbidden

post.summary: Invoke an MCP server via marketplace proxy (x402 payment)
Start Stripe Connect onboarding for developer

get.description: Returns subscription tiers, credit bundles, and perpetual license pricing. Prices sourced from Stripe when configured, otherwise server-side defaults.

post.summary: Apply a Yjs binary update to a document

get.summary: Get current Yjs document state as base64

post.summary: Get WebSocket URL for agent collaboration
Apply server-side edit to agent document

get.summary: Get agent document state and connected clients

post.description: Accepts structured error payloads from CMS client-side and any other app that cannot write to the DB directly. Requires X-Internal-Token header.
